patterns.description: Family prosperity and safety are maintained through a recurring supernatural contract that requires each generation's heir to fulfill a specific dangerous obligation.
The protagonist must undergo a solitary confinement ritual at a specific age and time window to inherit family status or secrets.
An artifact functions as a recording device that reveals past events or lineage history visually instead of reflecting the present reality.
The narrative reframes family success not as a result of virtue or merit, but as a leased commodity paid for with supernatural risk.
Inanimate objects associated with the supernatural agreement exhibit biological movement to enforce or signal the contract's active state.
